name: The Structures Group
message: The Structures Group, Inc is a consulting engineering firm specializing in structural engineering, special inspections, and forensic analysis. They offer services including independent review plans and due diligence/risk analysis, catering to a diverse clientele that includes commercial, residential, and institutional projects. Their expertise spans various sectors such as healthcare, education, and justice facilities. The company is committed to delivering high-quality engineering solutions to enhance structural integrity and safety.
